description_long: This electric kettle features a tall, cylindrical transparent container with a metallic lid and a sturdy black handle attached to the side. The base is broad and rectangular with rounded edges, finished in a metallic blue-gray color, and houses a digital control panel with multiple buttons and indicator lights. The transparent upper chamber allows visibility of the contents, while the lid is flat with a central knob and appears to be removable. A power cord extends from the base, indicating its electric functionality. The handle is ergonomically designed for easy gripping and pouring, and the spout is subtly integrated into the rim of the container. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban kitchens or communal spaces.
description: A modern electric kettle with a transparent cylindrical body, metallic lid, digital control panel, and ergonomic black handle, set on a broad blue-gray base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent container, metallic lid, and the broad blue-gray base with the power cord visible on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the black side-mounted handle, digital control panel, and the spout integrated into the rim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the transparent container, the lid, and the power cord extending from the right side of the base.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the handle's shape and attachment, as well as the base's rounded design and the cord coiled at the back.
